# CWE-841: Improper Enforcement of Behavioral Workflow (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-841-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Account struct {
	ID        uint
	Email     string
	MFAPassed bool
}

// Safe: reset requires the MFA workflow step to be completed first.
func ResetAccount(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	email := c.PostForm("email")
	newPass := c.PostForm("new_password")
	var acct Account
	if err := db.Where("email = ?", email).First(&acct).Error; err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	if !acct.MFAPassed {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	db.Model(&acct).Update("password", newPass)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
